basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 128 Anganwadi Worker and Helper Posts in Shravasti District
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the District Programme Officer, Shravasti
basic_details.short_information: The Shravasti Anganwadi Bharti 2026 is being conducted under Government Order (Shasanadesh) No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025, which lays down the recruitment procedure for Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts on honorarium basis in Uttar Pradesh's urban and rural child development project areas.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 6 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 7 July 2026 Online Application Last Date: 27 July 2026 (till 12:00 midnight) Age Reckoning / Cut-off Date: 1 July 2026 Income Certificate Validity: Calculated from the date of publication of this notification | No offline or postal applications will be accepted under any circumstances for this recruitment.

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for Anganwadi Karyakartri or Sahayika recruitment in Shravasti district. Candidates are advised to confirm this on the official vacancy portal at the time of applying.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Cut-off Date for Age Calculation: 1 July 2026 The date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate is the only valid proof of age for Anganwadi Karyakartri/Sahayika recruitment.

qualification.details: The minimum educational qualification for both Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts is Intermediate (12th) pass or an equivalent qualification. Merit is prepared by adding marks obtained in graduation and post-graduation (if any) to the minimum Intermediate-level marks, as prescribed under points 7(I) to 7(IV) of the governing Government Order, through the departmental portal.

salary_details.details: Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts are honorarium-based positions under the Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) scheme. The notification does not specify a fixed honorarium figure; candidates should refer to the applicable state government orders on the ICDS/Bal Vikas Seva evam Pushtahar department website for the current honorarium structure.

selection_process: Selection to the posts of Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika is made purely on a merit basis as per the district Chayan Samiti (Selection Committee) process laid down in Shasanadesh No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025. There is no written examination or interview. Key points of the selection process include:
Merit is determined using the minimum Intermediate/equivalent marks
with additional marks added for graduation and post-graduation qualifications where applicable. Applications are scrutinised at the project/district level for eligibility on residence
and qualification criteria. BPL (Below Poverty Line) status is determined as per the income limits fixed under Government Order No. 22/2015/2123/26-2-2015 dated 14 September 2015 (as amended). Widow
and deserted women applicants are prioritised as per category norms within their gram sabha/ward. The decision of the district Chayan Samiti is final.
how_to_apply: Visit the official vacancy management portal, upanganwadibharti.in.
Locate the Shravasti district Anganwadi Bharti notification and click on the online application link.
Register using your basic details such as name, date of birth, mobile number, and Aadhaar number, and create a password.
Log in and fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and residential details carefully.
Select the relevant project (Ikauna, Gilaula, Hariharpurrani, Jamunaha, Sirsiya, or Shahar) and the Gram Sabha/Ward against which the vacancy exists.
Upload all required documents in the prescribed format with correct, verifiable details.
Review the filled application form thoroughly before final submission, as spelling or factual errors will be resolved only in favour of the original documents.
Submit the application before 27 July 2026, 12:00 midnight, and save/print the confirmation for future reference.
important_instructions: Applications will be accepted only through the online vacancy management portal; offline forms will not be accepted or considered under any circumstances. Any incomplete application, or one where required documents are not uploaded, will not be accepted online or by post. Candidates are solely responsible for the accuracy of information and documents submitted; false, incorrect, or manipulated marks/facts will lead to rejection of the candidature. Reserved category posts will accept applications only from that specific category; unreserved posts accept applications from any category. The validity of the income certificate is counted from the date this notification is published. Detailed eligibility criteria and the application proforma are also available at the Tehsil office, Block Development Office, Child Development Project Officer office, and Vikas Bhawan office of the District Programme Officer, Shravasti, during office hours.

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Shravasti: Overview
content_sections.text: The Shravasti Anganwadi Bharti 2026 is being conducted under Government Order (Shasanadesh) No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025, which lays down the recruitment procedure for Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts on honorarium basis in Uttar Pradesh's urban and rural child development project areas.

rows.details: Office of the District Programme Officer, Shravasti

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Shravasti Bharti 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 6 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 7 July 2026 Online Application Last Date: 27 July 2026 (till 12:00 midnight) Age Reckoning / Cut-off Date: 1 July 2026 Income Certificate Validity: Calculated from the date of publication of this notification No offline or postal applications will be accepted under any circumstances for this recruitment.

content_sections.heading: Shravasti Anganwadi Vacancy Details 2026 (Project-Wise)
content_sections.text: The 128 vacant posts are spread across six Anganwadi projects in Shravasti district - Ikauna, Gilaula, Hariharpurrani, Jamunaha, Sirsiya, and Shahar (urban). Ward-wise and Gram Sabha-wise reservation details of these vacancies have been displayed at the Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, Block Development Office, and respective Child Development Project (CDPO) offices, and are also uploaded on the vacancy management portal.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Only local/domiciled female candidates are eligible to apply for the advertised posts. The applicant must be a resident of the ward (in case of a Nagar Nikay/urban post) or the Gram Panchayat (in case of a rural post) against which the vacancy exists. The entire selection process will be conducted strictly as per the provisions of Shasanadesh No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025. A reserved-category post is open only to applicants belonging to that category; unreserved posts accept applications from candidates of any category. Widow, divorced, deserted (parityakta), and disability category status must be clearly mentioned in the application form; claims made after submission will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: The minimum educational qualification for both Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts is Intermediate (12th) pass or an equivalent qualification. Merit is prepared by adding marks obtained in graduation and post-graduation (if any) to the minimum Intermediate-level marks, as prescribed under points 7(I) to 7(IV) of the governing Government Order, through the departmental portal.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Cut-off Date for Age Calculation: 1 July 2026 The date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate is the only valid proof of age for Anganwadi Karyakartri/Sahayika recruitment.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Honorarium
content_sections.text: Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts are honorarium-based positions under the Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) scheme. The notification does not specify a fixed honorarium figure; candidates should refer to the applicable state government orders on the ICDS/Bal Vikas Seva evam Pushtahar department website for the current honorarium structure.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention any application fee for Anganwadi Karyakartri or Sahayika recruitment in Shravasti district. Candidates are advised to confirm this on the official vacancy portal at the time of applying.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection to the posts of Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika is made purely on a merit basis as per the district Chayan Samiti (Selection Committee) process laid down in Shasanadesh No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025. There is no written examination or interview. Key points of the selection process include: Merit is determined using the minimum Intermediate/equivalent marks, with additional marks added for graduation and post-graduation qualifications where applicable. Applications are scrutinised at the project/district level for eligibility on residence, age, and qualification criteria. BPL (Below Poverty Line) status is determined as per the income limits fixed under Government Order No. 22/2015/2123/26-2-2015 dated 14 September 2015 (as amended). Widow, divorced, and deserted women applicants are prioritised as per category norms within their gram sabha/ward. The decision of the district Chayan Samiti is final.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: High School marksheet/certificate (for date of birth proof) Intermediate and higher educational qualification marksheets/certificates Online digitally signed residence (niwas) certificate issued by the Tehsil Online digitally signed caste certificate (if applying under a reserved category) Income certificate issued by a competent authority as per Revenue Department GO No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj0-9 dated 30.09.2011 (as amended) Widow candidates: death certificate of husband issued by the Gram Panchayat Adhikari/concerned Nagar Nikay, or a certified copy of the family register (parivar register) Divorced/deserted candidates: legal order issued by a competent court Recent passport-size photograph and signature for upload on the portal All uploaded documents must be self-attested, clean, and legible. Applications with missing information or unuploaded documents will not be accepted offline or by post under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online for Shravasti Anganwadi Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official vacancy management portal, upanganwadibharti.in. Locate the Shravasti district Anganwadi Bharti notification and click on the online application link. Register using your basic details such as name, date of birth, mobile number, and Aadhaar number, and create a password. Log in and fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and residential details carefully. Select the relevant project (Ikauna, Gilaula, Hariharpurrani, Jamunaha, Sirsiya, or Shahar) and the Gram Sabha/Ward against which the vacancy exists. Upload all required documents in the prescribed format with correct, verifiable details. Review the filled application form thoroughly before final submission, as spelling or factual errors will be resolved only in favour of the original documents. Submit the application before 27 July 2026, 12:00 midnight, and save/print the confirmation for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications will be accepted only through the online vacancy management portal; offline forms will not be accepted or considered under any circumstances. Any incomplete application, or one where required documents are not uploaded, will not be accepted online or by post. Candidates are solely responsible for the accuracy of information and documents submitted; false, incorrect, or manipulated marks/facts will lead to rejection of the candidature. Reserved category posts will accept applications only from that specific category; unreserved posts accept applications from any category. The validity of the income certificate is counted from the date this notification is published. Detailed eligibility criteria and the application proforma are also available at the Tehsil office, Block Development Office, Child Development Project Officer office, and Vikas Bhawan office of the District Programme Officer, Shravasti, during office hours.

content_sections.heading: Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Vacancy Portal (Apply Online): upanganwadibharti.in Official Notification: Available on the Shravasti district notice board pages of the same portal (Shravasti Anganwadi Bharti Vigyapti dated 06-07-2026) Department Reference: Directorate of Bal Vikas Seva evam Pushtahar, Uttar Pradesh, Lucknow Candidates should always cross-check dates, vacancy numbers, and eligibility conditions with the original PDF notification uploaded on the official portal before applying, since online details are considered subordinate to the original notification in case of any discrepancy.

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi vacancies are there in Shravasti district in 2026?
faq.answer: There are 128 total vacancies in Shravasti district — 60 Anganwadi Karyakartri (Worker) posts and 68 Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) posts — across six projects: Ikauna, Gilaula, Hariharpurrani, Jamunaha, Sirsiya, and Shahar.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Shravasti?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 7 July 2026, and the last date to submit the application is 27 July 2026 till 12:00 midnight.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Anganwadi Karyakartri/Sahayika recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years, calculated as on the cut-off date of 1 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate (12th) or an equivalent examination.

faq.question: Q5. Can male candidates apply for Anganwadi Karyakartri or Sahayika posts?
faq.answer: No. As per the official notification, only female candidates who are local/domiciled residents of the concerned ward or Gram Panchayat are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q6. Is there a written exam for UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Selection is made purely on a merit-list basis using educational marks, as per the district Chayan Samiti process; there is no written examination or interview.
